welcome.title: What can I help with?
welcome.body: Ask your local Enchan a question or give it a task.
composer.toolNotice: Enchan may run local tools according to your settings.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Theme, language, and local background
appearance.language.title: Language
appearance.language.description: Choose the language used by the Web UI.
appearance.language.label: Interface language
appearance.theme.title: Theme
appearance.theme.description: Choose the interface colors independently from the background image.
appearance.background.title: Background image
appearance.background.storage: Stored only in this browser and available offline.
appearance.note: Theme, language, and background settings stay local to this browser. No network access is used.
appearance.error.openStorage: Could not open local image storage.
appearance.error.invalidType: Choose a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
appearance.error.tooLarge: Background image must be 20 MB or smaller.
appearance.error.store: Could not store the background image.
appearance.error.remove: Could not remove the background image.
mascot.title: Mascot
mascot.subtitle: Compatible mascot contact sheet
mascot.name: Name
mascot.sheetRequirement: Required: 1536×1872 px, 8 columns × 9 rows, 192×208 px per frame
mascot.previewEmpty: Register an image to preview it.
mascot.sheetVerticalEdge: Cell {row}-{column} touches its top or bottom edge. Keep at least 6 transparent pixels inside every cell.
mascot.sheetHorizontalEdge: Cell {row}-{column} touches its left or right edge. Keep at least 6 transparent pixels inside every cell.
errors.init: Failed to initialize the Web UI: {message}
